'''''Pizzazz'' 1''' is the first issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[October]] [[1977]] and featured the [[Untitled Pizzazz 1 comic|beginning]] of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''.

It also contained the article '''''Meet the Star Wars Superstars!''''' by Katy Hall, which was a behind-the-scenes look at how [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] were designed and filmed for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']].<ref name="Issue 1" />

In addition to ''The Keeper's World'' and ''Meet the Star Wars Superstars!'', Pizzazz #1 also had a Star Wars cover featuring R2-D2 and C-3PO, where they satirically state that Darth Vader is arriving with a can opener, his ultimate weapon. It also included an advertisement and order form for [[Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars 1]] and [[Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars 2]].<ref name="Issue 1" />
